---
title: "06-21-2026-BulkRNA_DE_Anlysis"
output: html_document
---

```{rsetup }
# ================================
# Bulk RNA-seq DE analysis
# OPA1 KO vs WT, ATF4 KO vs WT, AO KO vs WT
# ================================

library(DESeq2)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(EnhancedVolcano)

# ----------------
# 1. Load counts
# ----------------
counts_file <- "~/Desktop/Lab_Streeter_new/BULKRNASEQ_AJ/DATA/salmon.merged.gene_counts_length_scaled.relabeled.tsv"

counts_raw <- read.delim(counts_file, check.names = FALSE)

# Save gene annotation separately
gene_info <- counts_raw[, c("gene_id", "gene_name")]

# Use unique gene_id as row names
rownames(counts_raw) <- counts_raw$gene_id

# Remove annotation columns
counts <- counts_raw[, !(colnames(counts_raw) %in% c("gene_id", "gene_name"))]

# Convert to numeric matrix and round for DESeq2
counts <- round(as.matrix(counts))

# Check
dim(counts)
head(counts[, 1:5])

# ----------------
# 2. Create metadata
# ----------------
samples <- colnames(counts)

metadata <- data.frame(sample = samples) %>%
  mutate(
    model = case_when(
      grepl("^O", sample) & !grepl("^AO", sample) ~ "OPA1",
      grepl("^A", sample) & !grepl("^AO", sample) ~ "ATF4",
      grepl("^AO", sample) ~ "AO"
    ),
    genotype = case_when(
      grepl("WT", sample) ~ "WT",
      grepl("KO", sample) ~ "KO"
    ),
    diet = case_when(
      grepl("CD", sample) ~ "CD",
      grepl("HFD", sample) ~ "HFD"
    )
  )

rownames(metadata) <- metadata$sample

# Make sure sample order matches
metadata <- metadata[colnames(counts), ]

# ----------------
# 3. Function for DE
# ----------------
run_DE <- function(model_name, output_prefix) {
  
  keep_samples <- metadata$model == model_name
  
  sub_counts <- counts[, keep_samples]
  sub_meta <- metadata[keep_samples, ]
  
  sub_meta$genotype <- factor(sub_meta$genotype, levels = c("WT", "KO"))
  sub_meta$diet <- factor(sub_meta$diet, levels = c("CD", "HFD"))
  
  dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(
    countData = sub_counts,
    colData = sub_meta,
    design = ~ diet + genotype
  )
  
  # Filter low-count genes
  dds <- dds[rowSums(counts(dds)) >= 10, ]
  
  dds <- DESeq(dds)
  
  res <- results(dds, contrast = c("genotype", "KO", "WT"))
  res_df <- as.data.frame(res)
  res_df$gene <- rownames(res_df)
  
  res_df <- res_df %>%
    arrange(padj)
  
  write.csv(res_df, paste0(output_prefix, "_DE_results.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
  
  sig <- res_df %>%
    filter(!is.na(padj), padj < 0.05, abs(log2FoldChange) >= 0.58)
  
  write.csv(sig, paste0(output_prefix, "_significant_FDR0.05_log2FC0.58.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
  
  png(paste0(output_prefix, "_volcano.png"), width = 1000, height = 800)
  EnhancedVolcano(
    res_df,
    lab = res_df$gene,
    x = "log2FoldChange",
    y = "padj",
    title = paste0(output_prefix, " KO vs WT"),
    pCutoff = 0.05,
    FCcutoff = 0.58,
    pointSize = 2,
    labSize = 3
  )
  dev.off()
  
  return(res_df)
}

# ----------------
# 4. Run comparisons
# ----------------
opa1_res <- run_DE("OPA1", "OPA1_KO_vs_WT")
atf4_res <- run_DE("ATF4", "ATF4_KO_vs_WT")
ao_res   <- run_DE("AO",   "AO_KO_vs_WT")

# ----------------
# 5. Check genes of interest
# ----------------
genes_interest <- c("Opa1", "Atf4", "Fgf21")

goi_results <- bind_rows(
  opa1_res %>% filter(gene %in% genes_interest) %>% mutate(comparison = "OPA1_KO_vs_WT"),
  atf4_res %>% filter(gene %in% genes_interest) %>% mutate(comparison = "ATF4_KO_vs_WT"),
  ao_res   %>% filter(gene %in% genes_interest) %>% mutate(comparison = "AO_KO_vs_WT")
)

#write.csv(goi_results, "genes_of_interest_Opa1_Atf4_Fgf21.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# ----------------
# 6. Save metadata
# ----------------
write.csv(metadata, "sample_metadata.csv", row.names = FALSE)



```{r volcano-opa1-labelled, fig.width=10, fig.height=8, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(EnhancedVolcano)

# Genes you specifically want to label
genes_to_label <- c("Opa1", "Atf4", "Fgf21", "Ddit3", "Hspa5", "Trib3", "Asns")

# Add labels only for selected genes + top significant genes
opa1_plot_df <- opa1_res %>%
  mutate(
    label_gene = case_when(
      gene_name %in% genes_to_label ~ gene_name,
      !is.na(padj) & padj < 0.05 & abs(log2FoldChange) >= 0.58 ~ gene_name,
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  )

EnhancedVolcano(
  opa1_plot_df,
  lab = opa1_plot_df$label_gene,
  x = "log2FoldChange",
  y = "padj",
  title = "OPA1 KO vs WT",
  subtitle = "Negative log2FC = higher in WT | Positive log2FC = higher in KO",
  caption = "Contrast: KO vs WT, adjusted for diet",
  pCutoff = 0.05,
  FCcutoff = 0.58,
  pointSize = 2,
  labSize = 4,
  drawConnectors = TRUE,
  widthConnectors = 0.5,
  max.overlaps = Inf
)
```
